Line.h

7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCTEMREFACTORING_ARCTEMUTILS_OUTPUTFORMATTING_LINE_H
9 #define ARCTEMREFACTORING_ARCTEMUTILS_OUTPUTFORMATTING_LINE_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Mon Jan 13 09:37:26 2014
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/OutputFormatting/MultiColumn.h"
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/OutputFormatting/HLine.h"
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/OutputFormatting/Endl.h"
17 
18 #include <arcane/utils/Array.h>
19 #include <arcane/utils/StringBuilder.h>
20 
21 namespace OutputFormatting {
22 
23  class Line
24  {
25  public:
26 
27  Line(const Arcane::SharedArray<Indentation>& column_indentations)
28  : m_is_hline(false)
29  , m_current(0)
30  , m_is_finalized(false)
31  {
32  m_column_indentations = column_indentations.clone();
33  const Arcane::Integer ncols = m_column_indentations.size();
34  m_values.resize(ncols);
35  m_multi.resize(ncols);
36  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0 ; i < ncols; ++i)
37  m_multi[i] = 1;
38  }
39 
40  Line& operator<<(const Endl& l)
41  {
42  _finalize();
43  return *this;
44  }
45 
46  Line& operator<<(const Sep& s)
47  {
48  m_current += m_multi[m_current];
49  return *this;
50  }
51 
52  Line& operator<<(const HLine& l)
53  {
54  m_is_hline = true;
55  m_values[0] = l.separator();
56  m_multi[0] = m_values.size();
57  for(Arcane::Integer i = 1; i < m_values.size(); ++i)
58  m_multi[i] = 0;
59  return *this;
60  }
61 
62  Line& operator<<(const MultiColumn& m)
63  {
64  m_multi[m_current] = m.numberOfColumns();
65  m_column_indentations[m_current] = m.indentation();
66  return *this;
67  }
68 
69  Line& operator<<(const char* c)
70  {
71  return operator<<(std::string(c));
72  }
73 
74  template <typename T>
75  Line& operator<<(const T& t)
76  {
77  Arcane::StringBuilder sb(m_values[m_current]);
78  sb += t;
79  m_values[m_current] = sb.toString();
80  return *this;
81  }
82 
83  bool isHLine() const { return m_is_hline; }
84 
85  const Arcane::String& operator[](int i) const
86  {
87  return m_values[i];
88  }
89 
90  int multi(int i) const { return m_multi[i]; }
91 
92  const Indentation& indentation(int i) const { return m_column_indentations[i]; }
93 
94  bool isFinalized() const { return m_is_finalized; }
95 
96 private:
97 
98  void _finalize()
99  {
100  m_is_finalized = true;
101  if(m_is_hline) return;
102  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < m_values.size(); ++i) {
103  if(m_values.size() > 0) {
104  Arcane::StringBuilder sb(" ");
105  sb += m_values[i];
106  sb += " ";
107  m_values[i] = sb.toString();
108  }
109  }
110  }
111 
112  private:
113 
114  Arcane::SharedArray<Indentation> m_column_indentations;
115 
116  bool m_is_hline;
117 
118  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::String> m_values;
119 
120  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray m_multi;
121 
122  Arcane::Integer m_current;
123 
124  bool m_is_finalized;
125  };
126 
127 }
128 
129 #endif /* ARCTEMREFACTORING_ARCTEMUTILS_OUTPUTFORMATTING_LINE_H */
